title: Sentari agent audit-log ship payload v1
description: Request body for POST /api/v1/agent/audit-log. The agent ships batches of its local append-only SHA-256 hash-chained audit entries for independent server-side re-verification. Mirrors AgentAuditShipRequest / AgentAuditEntryPayload in server/services/agent_audit_ingest.py byte-for-byte; keep this file and the .md doc in sync across the server and sentari-agent repos.

device_id.description: UUID of the registered device. When mTLS is enforced it MUST equal the device bound to the client certificate (server returns 403 on mismatch).

entries.description: Audit entries for this shipment. An empty array is a valid 202 no-op. Server sorts by entry_id before verifying.

entry_id.description: Agent-local row id; monotonic, used with device_id to dedupe re-ships.

event_type.description: Event category (e.g. 'scan_started'). Part of the hash input.

detail.description: Free-text detail. Part of the hash input.

content_hash.description: sha256(event_type + detail + prev_hash + created_at), lowercase hex. Server recomputes and must match.

prev_hash.description: Previous entry's content_hash; empty string for the genesis entry.

created_at.description: EXACT RFC3339Nano string the agent fed into the hash. Stored verbatim; any reformatting breaks server-side hash verification.
